description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in manual mode was stopped behind traffic for a red traffic light on southbound Hyde Street, 
approaching the intersection with Pine Street in San Francisco. After the traffic light turned green, and just as the Zoox vehicle started to 
move, it was rear ended by an approaching minivan (Vehicle 2). The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the rear bumper. There were 
no reported injuries and police were not called. 
Print
Clear Form
